name: affiliate_oid
description: Unique object identifier for this Affiliate

name: tier_relationships
description: Relationship with other affiliates that recruted this affiliate

fields.name: affiliate_oid
fields.description: Affiliate object ID that recruited the affiliate

name: tax_id
description: Tax ID (can only be used to update)

name: marketing_strategy
description: Information about the affiliates marketing strategy

fields.name: using_ppc
fields.description: True if they are using pay per click ads

fields.name: using_website
fields.description: True if they are driving traffic from their website

fields.name: using_per_acquisition
fields.description: True if they are using a per acquisition model

fields.name: using_seo
fields.description: True if they are using search engine optimization techniques

fields.name: using_ad_network
fields.description: True if they are using an ad network

fields.name: using_adware
fields.description: True if they are using ad software

fields.name: using_blog
fields.description: True if they are using their blog

fields.name: using_other
fields.description: True if they are using some ohter marketing technique

name: google_conversion_id
description: Google Adwords conversion id to use for the tracking pixel

name: ysm_account_id
description: Yahoo Search Marketing account id to use for the tracking pixel

name: paypal_email
description: Alternate email address to use for their PayPal payment if different than their primary email

name: auto_apply_coupon_oid
description: Coupon object id to automatically apply when this affiliate sends traffic

name: auto_apply_coupon_code
description: Coupon code to automatically apply when this affiliate sends traffic

name: affiliate_commission_group_oid
description: Commission group that this affiliate is assigned to

name: allow_downline_recruiting
description: True if affiliate is allowed to recruit downline affiliates

name: analytics_internal_tracking
description: True if this is used for internal tracking and should not influence UltraCart Analytics

name: accepted_downline_recruiting_terms
description: True if affiliate has agreed to the terms associated with recruiting downline affiliates

name: last_terms_acceptance
description: Last date/time the affiliate program terms were agreed to

name: html_permitted
description: True if the affiliate is allowed to specify custom HTML to render on the receipt

name: check_payable_to
description: If the affiliate wants to be paid by check instead of PayPal, then this is the name to make the check out to

name: allow_google_adwords_tracking
description: True if the affiliate is allowed to have their Google Adwords tracking pixel on the receipt

name: allow_yahoo_search_marketing_tracking
description: True if the affiliate is allowed to have their Yahoo Search Marketing tracking pixel on the receipt

name: auto_approve_commissions
description: True if this affiliates commissions are automatically approved

name: prevent_cookie_stomping
description: True if cookie stomping of this affiliate is prevented

name: attributes
description: Custom attributes about the affiliate that can be used in the catalog/StoreFront

name: dob_hash
description: Date of birth SHA-256 Base 64 Hash

name: remove_cookie_after_purchase
description: If true, affiliate cookies are removed after a purchase.

name: prevent_sending_all_emails
description: If true, affiliate will not receive any email notifications.
